line_checks.label: Foundation validation command
line_checks.expected_line: python3 scripts/compatibility/validate-foundation.py

line_checks.label: Shared validation lane explanation
line_checks.expected_line: The shared validation lane restores `godot-spacetime.sln`, builds `godot-spacetime.sln -c Debug --no-restore`, and validates the documented support baseline before plugin enablement.

line_checks.label: Godot editor target
line_checks.expected_line: - Godot editor target: `4.6.2`

line_checks.label: SpacetimeDB baseline
line_checks.expected_line: - SpacetimeDB baseline: `2.1+`

line_checks.label: Foundation validation command
line_checks.expected_line: python3 scripts/compatibility/validate-foundation.py

line_checks.label: Shared validation lane explanation
line_checks.expected_line: The shared validation lane restores `godot-spacetime.sln`, builds `godot-spacetime.sln -c Debug --no-restore`, and validates the current support baseline before the editor tries to load the addon.

line_checks.label: Support baseline metadata source
line_checks.expected_line: The support baseline metadata used by the validation script lives in `scripts/compatibility/support-baseline.json`.

line_checks.label: Godot editor/runtime target
line_checks.expected_line: | Godot editor/runtime target | `4.6.2` | Product baseline for the initial shipping runtime. |

line_checks.label: Godot .NET build SDK
line_checks.expected_line: | Godot .NET build SDK | `Godot.NET.Sdk` `4.6.1` | Current stable official NuGet package used by the scaffold. |

line_checks.label: .NET SDK
line_checks.expected_line: | `.NET` SDK | `8.0+` | Use a local `.NET 8` SDK for restore and build. |

line_checks.label: SpacetimeDB server and CLI
line_checks.expected_line: | SpacetimeDB server and CLI | `2.1+` | Declared product baseline for later code-generation and runtime stories. |

line_checks.label: SpacetimeDB.ClientSDK
line_checks.expected_line: | `SpacetimeDB.ClientSDK` | `2.1.0` | Added as `PackageReference` in Story 1.4; the `.NET` adapter in `Internal/Platform/DotNet/` is the only permitted reference location. |

line_checks.label: Source of truth note
line_checks.expected_line: The machine-checkable source of truth for this baseline lives in `scripts/compatibility/support-baseline.json`, and `.github/workflows/validate-foundation.yml` enforces it through `python3 scripts/compatibility/validate-foundation.py`.

line_checks.label: Foundation validation command
line_checks.expected_line: python3 scripts/compatibility/validate-foundation.py

line_checks.expected_line: - `spacetime/modules/compatibility_fixture/` is reserved for future schema-drift and regeneration scenarios.

line_checks.expected_line: - `tests/fixtures/generated/` is reserved for read-only generated bindings consumed by tests.

line_checks.label: Fixture settings path
line_checks.expected_line: - `tests/fixtures/settings/` is reserved for non-shipping test settings and environment fixtures.
